content.question: What is the distribution of local social capital (bridging and bonding network strength) across Hungarian villages, and does it predict school retention outcomes independent of enrollment size and centralized funding rules?
content.reduction_path: Conduct multi-village survey and network analysis measuring social cohesion, civic engagement, and school-community linkage strength across ≥20 rural settlements with varying closure/retention outcomes; test whether social capital explains school survival conditional on enrollment and governance structure.
